title: Item <-> Subitem behavior

posts.author: baruchm (Baruch Moroz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to propose having the features suggested below for an item that has subitems.

  1. Timeline or Start/End dates should reflect the earliest and latest dates of the associated subitems.
  2. Being able to set dependency between a subitem to an item (and vice versa).
  3. Having the option to populate item’s data into its subitems in a seamless way (NOT by connecting boards and mirroring).

Thank you!
Baruch

posts.author: sescott (Steve Escott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Baruch,

I think that I have solutions for 1 + 3:

  1. You can select “Show Summary on parent Item” in the date column menu, which will show a timeline Mirror column with the start - end timeline of subitem dates. This summary information can even be used in Gantt charts as a timeline.

  2. You can use market place apps like Copy Paste Master to create board automations that allow item data to appear in text or number based subitem cells in a seamless way.

If you need any help with implementing either for these solutions, feel free to contact me via my site at alldayit.com, or pm me here.

Shalom
Steve

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
